relationships.source_registry: Source records align with source-registry vocabulary but are not canonical registry entries until reviewed.
relationships.evidence_pack: Future Evidence Pack Contract v0 should define reusable evidence semantics beyond source-pack inputs.
relationships.index_pack: Future Index Pack Contract v0 should define portable index artifacts; Source Pack v0 does not index.
relationships.contribution_pack: Future Contribution Pack Contract v0 should define submission/review envelopes.
relationships.master_index_review_queue: Future review queue must gate public acceptance.
relationships.public_search: Future import may feed local_index_only search after separate approval.
relationships.snapshots_native_relay: Future consumers may read validated public-safe packs only through their own contracts.

notes: The example pack is synthetic and does not prove real source coverage.
No hosted/master-index source pack acceptance exists.
